metrics.name: academorix.theme.themes.activated.total
metrics.description: ThemeActivated events fired. Increments once per activation.

metrics.name: academorix.theme.css_regen_duration_ms
metrics.description: RegenerateRenderedCssJob completion time. outcome: succeeded / failed / retried.

metrics.name: academorix.theme.resolver_duration_ms
metrics.description: TokenResolver::resolveTokens duration. cache_state: hit / miss / stale.

metrics.name: academorix.theme.contrast_findings.total
metrics.description: ContrastAuditor findings. severity: fail_aa / fail_aaa / warn / pass. wcag_level: AA / AAA.

metrics.name: academorix.theme.accessibility_flag_state
metrics.description: Fraction of active themes with each accessibility flag enabled (sampled every 60s). flag: high_contrast / reduced_motion / larger_text / focus_visible_always.

metrics.name: academorix.theme.rollback_available_activations
metrics.description: Count of retained historical Theme rows per (tenant, mode). Approaches the last-N cap (5 or 20).

metrics.name: academorix.theme.preset_thumbnail_generation_duration_ms
metrics.description: PreviewPresetJob completion time. outcome: succeeded / failed / timed_out.

metrics.name: academorix.theme.user_preference_updates.total
metrics.description: PATCH /me/theme-preference occurrences. preferred_mode: auto / light / dark.
